languages.original_text: "The suggestion makes sense to me. A good xenos is a dead xenos, and a half-living one is still a threat, even if it has been turned into a statue. If this state is reversible, spawn like them could cause a great deal of trouble."

languages.text: "Нахожу эту инициативу разумной. Хороший ксенос — мертвый ксенос, а полуживой все еще угроза, даже если превращен в статую. Если это состояние обратимо, твари вроде них способны доставить очень много проблем".

"The suggestion makes sense to me. A good xenos is a dead xenos, and a half-living one is still a threat, even if it has been turned into a statue. If this state is reversible, spawn like them could cause a great deal of trouble."
languages.original_text: "Нахожу эту инициативу разумной. Хороший ксенос — мертвый ксенос, а полуживой все еще угроза, даже если превращен в статую. Если это состояние обратимо, твари вроде них способны доставить очень много проблем".

"The suggestion makes sense to me. A good xenos is a dead xenos, and a half-living one is still a threat, even if it has been turned into a statue. If this state is reversible, spawn like them could cause a great deal of trouble."

languages.text: 「その提案は納得できる。良い異形は死んだ異形であり、半生でも像になっても脅威だ。もしこの状態が逆転できるなら、彼らのような産卵物は大きな問題を引き起こすだろう」
languages.original_text: "The suggestion makes sense to me. A good xenos is a dead xenos, and a half-living one is still a threat, even if it has been turned into a statue. If this state is reversible, spawn like them could cause a great deal of trouble."

traits.locale_text: 「その提案は納得できる。良い異形は死んだ異形であり、半生でも像になっても脅威だ。もしこの状態が逆転できるなら、彼らのような産卵物は大きな問題を引き起こすだろう。」

languages.text: « Cette suggestion me semble logique. Un bon xénos est un xénos mort ; même à moitié vivants et changés en statues, ils représentent toujours une menace. Si cet état est réversible, les créatures de ce genre pourraient causer toutes sortes de problèmes. »
languages.original_text: "The suggestion makes sense to me. A good xenos is a dead xenos, and a half-living one is still a threat, even if it has been turned into a statue. If this state is reversible, spawn like them could cause a great deal of trouble."

traits.locale_text: « Cette suggestion me semble logique. Un bon xénos est un xénos mort ; même à moitié vivants et changés en statues, ils représentent toujours une menace. Si cet état est réversible, les créatures de ce genre pourraient causer toutes sortes de problèmes. »

languages.text: "Für mich ergibt der Vorschlag Sinn. Nur tote Xenos sind gute Xenos, und ein Halbleben ist selbst dann eine Gefahr, wenn es in eine Statue verwandelt wurde. Sollte dieser Zustand reversibel sein, könnte uns dieses Gezücht vor große Probleme stellen."
languages.original_text: "The suggestion makes sense to me. A good xenos is a dead xenos, and a half-living one is still a threat, even if it has been turned into a statue. If this state is reversible, spawn like them could cause a great deal of trouble."

traits.locale_text: "Für mich ergibt der Vorschlag Sinn. Nur tote Xenos sind gute Xenos, und ein Halbleben ist selbst dann eine Gefahr, wenn es in eine Statue verwandelt wurde. Sollte dieser Zustand reversibel sein, könnte uns dieses Gezücht vor große Probleme stellen."

languages.text: "Öneri bana mantıklı geliyor. En iyi zeno, ölü zenodur. Yarı canlı olanı heykele dönüştürülmüş olsa bile hâlâ tehdittir. Eğer bu durum tersine çevrilebilirse onlar gibi döller büyük sorunlara yol açabilir."
languages.original_text: "The suggestion makes sense to me. A good xenos is a dead xenos, and a half-living one is still a threat, even if it has been turned into a statue. If this state is reversible, spawn like them could cause a great deal of trouble."

traits.locale_text: "Öneri bana mantıklı geliyor. En iyi zeno, ölü zenodur. Yarı canlı olanı heykele dönüştürülmüş olsa bile hâlâ tehdittir. Eğer bu durum tersine çevrilebilirse onlar gibi döller büyük sorunlara yol açabilir."

languages.text: «Me parece una sugerencia sensata. El xenos bueno es el xenos muerto, y estando medio vivos aún suponen una amenaza, aunque parezcan estatuas. Si su estado es reversible, estos engendros podrían causarnos problemas».
languages.original_text: "The suggestion makes sense to me. A good xenos is a dead xenos, and a half-living one is still a threat, even if it has been turned into a statue. If this state is reversible, spawn like them could cause a great deal of trouble."

traits.locale_text: «Me parece una sugerencia sensata. El xenos bueno es el xenos muerto, y estando medio vivos aún suponen una amenaza, aunque parezcan estatuas. Si su estado es reversible, estos engendros podrían causarnos problemas».

languages.text: “我同意这个建议。只有死的异形才是好异形，半死不活的依然是威胁，就算被做成雕塑也不例外。要是这状态还能逆转，像它们这样的孽种指不定会惹出多大麻烦。”
languages.original_text: "The suggestion makes sense to me. A good xenos is a dead xenos, and a half-living one is still a threat, even if it has been turned into a statue. If this state is reversible, spawn like them could cause a great deal of trouble."

traits.locale_text: “我同意这个建议。只有死的异形才是好异形，半死不活的依然是威胁，就算被做成雕塑也不例外。要是这状态还能逆转，像它们这样的孽种指不定会惹出多大麻烦。”
